name: Sausage and Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Place turkey sausage in a nonstick skillet and cook over medium heat until browned.
2. In a large bowl, mix the flour with baking powder and baking soda.
3. Add oat bran to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
4. Gradually add buttermilk while stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
5. Fold in the cheddar cheese and mix until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased or lined baking dish.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
